[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01111011 6
1 01000000 1
2 11111011 7
3 01110011 5
4 01001001 3
5 01010010 3
6 01000101 3
7 11001000 3

01 10 11111011 7 match 2
12 21 01111011 6 match 0
23 32 01111111 7

56 65 11111011 7 match 2
67 76 11011111 7
70 07 11011111 7
